message:
Running command: # Now update the TCL script with the correct SCRIPTS_DIR
cat > /tmp/grt_finish_nocheck.tcl << 'ENDSCRIPT'
# Manual GRT finisher - skips check_antennas (PSM fails on VCCD/VSSD)
# Writes ODB/DEF views from the completed global route guide.

# SCRIPTS_DIR (parent of openroad/ folder)
set ::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts
set ::env(STEP_DIR) /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting

# _TCL_ENV_IN must be set before io.tcl loads
set ::env(_TCL_ENV_IN) $::env(STEP_DIR)/_env.tcl

# Load all environment variables from _env.tcl
source $::env(_TCL_ENV_IN)

# Reset SCRIPTS_DIR (might be overridden by _env.tcl)
set ::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts

# Load the common io procedures (now _TCL_ENV_IN and SCRIPTS_DIR are set)
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/io.tcl

# Read the ODB from DetailedPlacement (step 29)
read_current_odb

# Load the global routing guide (already written by first GRT pass)
puts "Loading global routing guide..."
read_guides $::env(STEP_DIR)/after_grt.guide

# Run parasitics estimation
puts "Running set_rc..."
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/set_rc.tcl

puts "Estimating parasitics..."
estimate_parasitics -global_routing

# Write views (ODB + DEF)
puts "Writing views..."
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/write_views.tcl
write_views

puts "GRT views written successfully. Skipped check_antennas (VCCD/VSSD PSM issue)."
ENDSCRIPT

echo "Script written (v3)"

function.arguments:

set ::env(STEP_DIR) /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting

source $::env(_TCL_ENV_IN)

# Reset SCRIPTS_DIR (might be overridden by _env.tcl)
set ::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts

# Load the common io procedures (now _TCL_ENV_IN and SCRIPTS_DIR are set)
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/io.tcl

# Read the ODB from DetailedPlacement (step 29)
read_current_odb

# Load the global routing guide (already written by first GRT pass)
puts "Loading global routing guide..."
read_guides $::env(STEP_DIR)/after_grt.guide

# Run parasitics estimation
puts "Running set_rc..."
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/set_rc.tcl

puts "Estimating parasitics..."
estimate_parasitics -global_routing

# Write views (ODB + DEF)
puts "Writing views..."
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/write_views.tcl
write_views

puts "GRT views written successfully. Skipped check_antennas (VCCD/VSSD PSM issue)."
ENDSCRIPT

echo "Script written (v3)""}

message:
Running command: STEP32="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting"

nohup /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad \
    -no_splash \

    -metrics "$STEP32/or_metrics_out.json" \

tail -15 /tmp/grt_finish.log
